title: Easy Digital Dashboard Display

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Easy Digital Dashboard Display

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#090a0f`
* `#411C56`
* `#909090`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='260' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/>
  <text x='20' y='20' font-size='24' fill='#C06C88'>User Profile</text>
  <rect x='20' y='60' width='100' height='20' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='30' y='65' font-size='16' fill='#411C56'>Username: JohnDoe</text>
  <rect x='20' y='100' width='150' height='20' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='30' y='105' font-size='16' fill='#411C56'>Email: johndoe@example.com</text>
  <rect x='20' y='140' width='120' height='20' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='30' y='145' font-size='16' fill='#411C56'>Status:</text>
  <circle cx='50' cy='155' r='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <rect x='120' y='150' width='80' height='20' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='130' y='155' font-size='16' fill='#411C56'>Online</text>
  <rect x='20' y='190' width='120' height='20' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='30' y='195' font-size='16' fill='#411C56'>Offline:</text>
  <circle cx='50' cy='205' r='10' fill='#909090'/>
  <button x='20' y='230' width='140' height='20' rx='5'><text x='20' y='7' font-size='16' fill='#411C56'>Toggle Offline</text></button>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use the specified color palette
Must implement interactive state updates for the offline status toggle

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Easy Digital Dashboard Display

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, offline status toggle functionality, and handlers.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
